runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 2nd over 300m at this track beaten half a length (17.27) behind Chip And Gravy in a Grade 5 on April 9. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged making it three straight at this track over 300m (17.24). Looks well placed and should feature.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy (16.92), beating Symi Surtee. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.04) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 11 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (17.16) over 300m at this track. Wide draw here. Has to do a bit more.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 7th on April 14 over 350m at Grafton behind Mid City Boss beaten 7 lengths (20.77) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at Grafton. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
